name: Bellhop
short_description: Bellhop is a hotel management game. Earn tips by bringing the guests the items they request. Use your savings to upgrade and improve your tools, or to spice up your wardrobe.
detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of a Bellhop, maintaining the smooth operation of a small hotel.

Earn tips by fulfilling daily clients' needs for food, coffee, towels and beddings. Improve and upgrade your tools of the trade to fulfill needs faster and earn bigger tips.

Features:

  • A fun gameplay loop based on meeting the daily needs of clients.

  • A variety of levels throughout four seasons that introduce unique challenges.

  • Customize your look and buy upgrades with the tips you earn!

  • Unlock additional gameplay modes!

So what are you waiting for? Hop to it!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German
*languages with full audio support
